title: Caelesti
description: An advanced and innovative resource pack developed with Fabulously Optimised
body:
**Please Note:** Fabulously Optimised 1.21.8 does not currently include Polytone. Please manually add [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone/version/1.21.8-3.5.4-alpha) 1.21.8-3.5.4-alpha to your Fabulously Optimised instance.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/M8_Kf7NR7y8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Caelesti is an advanced resource pack, developed using Fabulously Optimised. From complex nested Connected Textures, to specifically tailored colourmaps, Caelesti has it all! Many of the biomes in your world will have a completely different look and feel due to biome specific colours and textures. You'll find custom items approaches, altered entity models, a huge variety in flora, and much much more.

To stay up to date with the development of Caelesti, you can subscribe to my [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@skalibercaelesti/videos) where I frequently post updates to the pack and its' many unique and novel features.
